ogTitle: North Macksville vs North Manly: Climate Safety

heading: North Macksville vs North Manly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Macksville, New South Wales and North Manly, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Macksville has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to North Manly (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Macksville or North Manly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Macksville has a flood risk score of 27/100, while North Manly scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Macksville scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. North Manly scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Macksville or North Manly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Macksville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
